meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Finish Your First SaaS App
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning side projects. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build, deploy, and ship your first professional portfolio-ready app.
content.answer_block: The 'Antigravity' project template solves the 'abandonment trap' by enforcing modular architecture and automated scaffolding. By pairing this template with Claude Code, you offload the repetitive boilerplate, allowing you to focus on high-value business logic and shipping a functional, polished MVP that proves your skills to future employers.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a graveyard of half-baked GitHub repos. The initial dopamine hit of a new project fades the moment you hit complex state management or deployment headaches. You aren't failing because you lack talent; you’re failing because you lack a system that bridges the gap between 'idea' and 'shippable product.'

Enter the Antigravity project template. It’s not just code; it’s a blueprint designed to keep you moving when the friction gets high. When integrated with the surgical precision of Claude Code, you stop fighting your editor and start architecting solutions. Let's turn your next 'idea' into a live URL.

steps.title: Initialize with Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a production-ready file structure that prevents technical debt before you write a single line of business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize an Antigravity project with Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration. Configure the directory for a modular feature-based architecture.

steps.title: Define Schema with Claude Code
steps.description: Use AI to enforce database integrity early, ensuring your data model is robust enough to handle growth.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a SQL migration file for a User, Subscription, and Project entity. Include Row Level Security policies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create Supabase migration for user management and project tracking'

steps.title: Implement Core Business Logic
steps.description: Build the primary feature set using the Antigravity pattern to keep components decoupled and testable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for handling project creation logic, ensuring all inputs are validated via Zod.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the service layer for project creation with Zod validation'

steps.title: Integrate UI Components
steps.description: Leverage pre-built UI primitives to maintain a professional aesthetic without getting stuck in CSS hell.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive dashboard layout using the Antigravity UI library, focusing on mobile-first design.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Build the dashboard UI using existing components'

steps.title: Automate Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Configure CI/CD so that every commit is a potential release, keeping your momentum high.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a GitHub Actions workflow for the Antigravity template to run tests and deploy to Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Configure GitHub Actions for automated testing and deployment'

pro_tips: Always commit after every successful feature module; incremental progress is the antidote to project abandonment.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your service layer immediately after implementation to prevent regression.
Keep your 'antigravity_prompt' library in a Notion doc so you can replicate your setup in under 5 minutes for future projects.
If you feel stuck, force a 'Refactor' session with Claude Code to clean up technical debt, which often clears mental blocks.
Prioritize shipping a 'boring' working app over a 'complex' broken one; portfolio value comes from functionality, not code complexity.
content.next_steps: Deploy your project to Vercel, document your learning process in a README, and share your live URL on LinkedIn to get feedback from other builders.
content.conversion_block: Don't let another project gather digital dust. You have the tools, the template, and the roadmap to ship a professional-grade application that will set you apart from every other student. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
